name: 5-Minute Scalp v2
description: Professional-grade 5-minute breakout scalping strategy. Targets 3-5 trades/day on liquid Hyperliquid perps using 15m trend bias + 5m execution with ADX, VWAP, CVD, and volume confirmation.
features: VWAP session filter with early-session exclusion
Partial exit at 1R (30%) + trail remainder to 1.8R
Circuit breakers: daily loss, consecutive loss, flash crash
